description_long: This vending machine is a rectangular, upright unit with a prominent front panel featuring the branding 'DR. BREENS PRIVATE RESERVE' over a blue water droplet graphic. The front face includes a product selection interface with multiple buttons, a payment area, and a product retrieval slot. The sides and back are finished in a dark, speckled texture, suggesting a metal or composite casing with some wear or patina. The back panel features a warning sticker, a vent, and a service access panel, indicating internal refrigeration or electronics. The machine's overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, suitable for placement in public or semi-public urban environments. Its design is typical of beverage vending machines found in streets, parks, or building lobbies.
description: A robust, rectangular vending machine with blue-themed branding, a button interface, and a product slot on the front, encased in a dark, speckled metal shell.
description_view_0: The left side of the vending machine, showing a dark, speckled surface with no visible interactive features.
description_view_1: The front view displays the branding, product selection buttons, payment interface, and product retrieval slot, all set against a blue water droplet graphic.
description_view_2: The right side, similar to the left, features a dark, speckled finish with no interactive elements.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a warning sticker, a vent, and a service panel, indicating access for maintenance and internal components.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper right section of the front face, above the product selection buttons, featuring printed instructions and possibly a digital readout.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the upper right of the front face, including a coin slot and a bill acceptor, both vertically aligned.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: There are eight rectangular, individually labeled product selection buttons arranged in a vertical column on the right side of the front panel.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the lower center of the front panel, with a blue frame and a recessed opening.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large white text reading 'DR. BREENS PRIVATE RESERVE' is prominently displayed on the front, over a blue water droplet graphic, occupying most of the upper and central area.
